acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-golang SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The openEuler Golang SIG wants to provide our developers and users a better golang experience.. The SIG has 6 core members and maintains 3 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-golang SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-golang SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at NA; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-golang SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-golang SIG maintains 3 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-golang.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-golang SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-golang SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: Rui Jing, Quanyi Ma, Chao Han. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
